case_title: HARRELL, PAUL A. vs. MALLERY, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALLERY, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1121 MASONIC AVE #5, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
